_note: Refreshed by the refresh-sports-feed scheduled task. Each item is {headline, url, source, published (ISO8601), snark}. Snark voice: Barstool-adjacent guy-at-the-bar, crass, horny, cocky, zero filler. One sentence. No slurs, no punching down at specific real people in a harmful way. Punch sideways (at media, front offices, rival fanbases) and up (at ownership). Keep it Boston.

items.headline: Garrett Crochet to 15-day IL with shoulder inflammation, Eaton recalled
items.snark: Ace lefty felt fatigued, team hopes minimum stint gets him right before the bullpen implodes completely.

items.headline: Fired Red Sox manager Alex Cora shows true colors in farewell email
items.snark: Cora texted reporters he's happy after firing, also praised Fenway in email like the last passenger off Titanic.

items.headline: Blue Jays 8, Red Sox 1: Bello melts down, offense leaves 19 on base
items.snark: Bello got yanked in the fourth and pouted in the dugout like a toddler who lost his binky.

items.headline: Patriots scouting department sees more turnover after NFL Draft
items.snark: Marshall Oium out as director of scouting projects, Midwest scout Hickman bolts for Atlanta, churn continues.

items.headline: Hunter Henry looking to pay it forward mentoring rookie Eli Raridon
items.snark: Henry embraces mentor role for third-round TE, still stings about that Super Bowl loss to Seattle.

items.headline: Patriots UDFA tracker: 20 undrafted rookies signed after 2026 draft
items.snark: Pats signed 20 UDFAs including four wide receivers, which means camp bodies or desperation depth moves.

items.headline: Robert Spillane gives promising update after late-season injury woes
items.snark: Spillane sounds healthy heading into offseason workouts, which is good news for a defense that needs bodies.

items.headline: Patriots make first roster cuts following 2026 draft: Mitchell, Jiles, Lang
items.snark: RB Elijah Mitchell, WR John Jiles, TE Marshall Lang all waived to make room for rookie haul.

items.headline: Rob Gronkowski voted into Patriots Hall of Fame as 38th inductee
items.snark: Gronk becomes 38th Hall member, showed off new boat on FaceTime because of course he did.
